lessons.title: Sautéing Basics
lessons.description: Learn the technique of sautéing vegetables to enhance flavors and textures.
steps: Prepare your ingredients by chopping vegetables.
Heat oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add vegetables and stir frequently until tender and slightly caramelized.
safety_tips: Be cautious of hot oil to avoid burns.
Use a cutting board and knife safely when chopping vegetables.

lessons.title: Basic Vegetable Prep
lessons.description: Learn how to properly prepare vegetables for cooking.
steps: Wash vegetables thoroughly under running water.
Use a sharp knife to cut vegetables into uniform pieces for even cooking.
safety_tips: Always cut away from your body to avoid injuries.
Keep your knife sharp for safer cutting.

lessons.title: Making Simple Sauces
lessons.description: Create a basic sauce to complement your dishes.
steps: Combine ingredients like broth, butter, and herbs in a saucepan.
Simmer until the sauce thickens and flavors meld together.
safety_tips: Be careful when handling hot liquids.
Use oven mitts when removing pots from the heat.
